name: CAROTID ARTERY STENOSIS
definition: severity of stenosis is primarily graded as a ratio of lumen diameter narrowing NOT

demographics.Age: beginning at birth slowly progressing to adult life
demographics.Location: large + medium-sized elastic and muscular arteries
demographics.Histo: deposition of fatty streaks + fibrous tissue; rarely shows intraplaque

distribution: large + medium-sized elastic and muscular arteries
